verdict_reason: Gateway repo correctly added to REPOS and JAVA_REPOS so update/status/install/test/docker-local-branches all cover it, and start-gateway mirrors start-backend; only a Minor .PHONY omission

todos.issue: New start-gateway target is not listed in .PHONY, unlike its siblings start-frontend/start-backend/start-admin; a file or directory named start-gateway at the workspace root would silently turn the target into a no-op
todos.fix: Add start-gateway to the .PHONY line alongside the other start-* targets
